Class Floor

java.lang.Object
Dungeon_Classes.Floor
public class Floor extends Object
Represents a single layer or floor layout within the dungeon. Handles reading structural text maps, generating and spawning hostile entities, rendering colorized matrix maps to the console, and evaluating step coordinates.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Floor(int floorNum)
    Constructs a floor tracking environment, sets standard boundaries, and populates structural elements via dynamic tile generations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    completeFloor(PlayableChar entity)
    Checks if the user-controlled character stands directly on top of the escape Exit structure, qualifying them to successfully finish exploration on this map level layer.
    void
    destroyTile(Tile tile)
    Replaces a specific block node with a regular, passable floor layout tile upon breakdown.
    void
    displayMap(PlayableChar player)
    Compiles and outputs colorized display strings to print the visual map grid out, handling priority layer overlays for the player character and active enemy status transformations.
    EnemyChar
    findEnemy(int x, int y)
    Iterates across tracking lists to find if a hostile enemy occupies the specified coordinate values.
    void
    generateFloor()
    Parses the flat document matrix file stream to initialize structural symbols, allocating destructible elements and forwarding enemy spawn definitions seamlessly.

    Validates if a chosen step destination falls safely inside the boundaries of the map grid and checks whether the physical layout features allow structural passability.

  • Constructor Details

    • Floor

      public Floor(int floorNum)
      Constructs a floor tracking environment, sets standard boundaries, and populates structural elements via dynamic tile generations.
      Parameters:
      floorNum - the unique level index tracking identifier for this map

  • Method Details

    • getMap

      public Tile[][] getMap()
      Returns:
      the multi-dimensional layout array of tiles

    • setMap

      public void setMap(Tile[][] map)
      Parameters:
      map - the replacement 2D array structure layout

    • getFloorNum

      public int getFloorNum()
      Returns:
      the current floor numerical index

    • setFloorNum

      public void setFloorNum(int floorNum)
      Parameters:
      floorNum - the new floor number value to record

    • getEnemies

      public ArrayList<EnemyChar> getEnemies()
      Returns:
      the list reference containing spawned enemies

    • getRowLen

      public int getRowLen()
      Returns:
      the row maximum size metric

    • setRowLen

      public void setRowLen(int rowLen)
      Parameters:
      rowLen - the new horizontal limit length

    • getColLen

      public int getColLen()
      Returns:
      the column maximum size metric

    • setColLen

      public void setColLen(int colLen)
      Parameters:
      colLen - the new vertical limit length

    • generateFloor

      public void generateFloor()
      Parses the flat document matrix file stream to initialize structural symbols, allocating destructible elements and forwarding enemy spawn definitions seamlessly.

    • displayMap

      public void displayMap(PlayableChar player)
      Compiles and outputs colorized display strings to print the visual map grid out, handling priority layer overlays for the player character and active enemy status transformations.
      Parameters:
      player - the user character instance utilized to cross-check grid overlapping

    • validateMove

      public boolean validateMove(Tile dest)
      Validates if a chosen step destination falls safely inside the boundaries of the map grid and checks whether the physical layout features allow structural passability.
      Parameters:
      dest - the target destination Tile component node being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the character can move into this position, false otherwise

    • destroyTile

      public void destroyTile(Tile tile)
      Replaces a specific block node with a regular, passable floor layout tile upon breakdown.
      Parameters:
      tile - the blocking landscape component being wiped

    • completeFloor

      public boolean completeFloor(PlayableChar entity)
      Checks if the user-controlled character stands directly on top of the escape Exit structure, qualifying them to successfully finish exploration on this map level layer.
      Parameters:
      entity - the user character instance to cross-reference
      Returns:
      true if escape condition requirements are reached, false otherwise

    • findEnemy

      public EnemyChar findEnemy(int x, int y)
      Iterates across tracking lists to find if a hostile enemy occupies the specified coordinate values.
      Parameters:
      x - target row horizontal grid element coordinate
      y - target column vertical grid element coordinate
      Returns:
      the matching EnemyChar instance found at that position, or null if none exist
